scripts.backend: cd backend && cmd /c "set PATH=%PATH%;C:\Program Files\nodejs && npm start"
scripts.frontend: cd frontend && cmd /c "set PATH=%PATH%;C:\Program Files\nodejs && npm run dev"
scripts.dev: npx concurrently "npm run db" "npm run backend" "npm run frontend"
scripts.build: cd rrdch_frontend/rrdch_frontend/frontend && npm install && npm run build
